ip_outcome_note: Card name explicitly identifies the character as Son Goten. Visual match is canonical: young child with spiky dark hair, dark gi, golden ki aura, forward-charging combat pose — all match Goten's standard depiction in Dragon Ball Z / Dragon Ball Super. The 'Tiny Rivals' series title in TB2 links Goten and Trunks as a paired card duo (TB2-004 Goten + TB2-007 Trunks). No ambiguity.

trivia_bullets.text: Goten and Trunks are paired in the TB2 set as the 'Tiny Rivals' Link Card duo (TB2-004 and TB2-007). The World Martial Arts Tournament set introduced Link Cards — mechanically paired cards whose art and effects work together — as a new mechanic for the DBS TCG. The two children entering the 25th World Tournament (the Buu Saga) as competing rivals was a major comedic and narrative thread of that arc. [Official DBS Card Game: WMAT Design Concept]
sources: Dragon Ball Wiki: World Martial Arts Tournament

trivia_bullets.text: Son Goten is Goku's youngest son, born in Age 767 — nine months after the Cell Saga — making him the youngest known half-Saiyan Super Saiyan in the series, having achieved the form at approximately age seven. He never met his father until that age. His appearance as a child is described as 'a spitting image of Goku's childhood look.' [Dragon Ball Wiki: Goten / Wikipedia]

At $0.04 market price, TB2-004 is deep bulk — the 'Tiny Rivals' framing places this card in a mechanical pairing with TB2-007 Trunks that requires both cards to fire the Link effect. Separated from its pair, it loses much of its design intent. [TCGplayer: World Martial Arts Tournament]
sources: TCGplayer: Dragon Ball Super CCG World Martial Arts Tournament

related_cards.name: Tiny Rivals Trunks
related_cards.note: The Link Card pair — Goten and Trunks are the 'Tiny Rivals' duo; mechanically and narratively inseparable in this set

related_cards.name: Mighty Mask, Powers Combined
related_cards.note: Goten and Trunks in disguise as Mighty Mask — same two children, same tournament

related_cards.name: Gotenks
related_cards.note: The Fusion Dance result of Goten and Trunks; their Fusion mastery is a plot thread developed during the Buu arc
